extensionDescription.message: Apply beautiful custom cursors to every webpage you visit.

popupTitle.description: Title shown in the popup header

popupSubtitle.description: Subtitle shown below the popup title

cursorDefault.description: Name of the default system cursor style

cursorCrosshair.description: Name of the crosshair cursor style

cursorPointerDot.description: Name of the pointer dot cursor style

cursorNeonRing.description: Name of the neon ring cursor style

cursorArrowClassic.description: Name of the classic arrow cursor style

cursorRetroPixel.description: Name of the retro pixel cursor style

cursorFeather.description: Name of the feather cursor style

cursorPawPrint.description: Name of the paw print cursor style

cursorStar.description: Name of the star cursor style

cursorHeart.description: Name of the heart cursor style

cursorDiamond.description: Name of the diamond cursor style

cursorLeaf.description: Name of the leaf cursor style

activeLabel.description: Label shown on the currently active cursor card

previewAreaLabel.description: Aria-label for the cursor preview div inside each card

cardAriaLabel.description: Aria-label for each cursor selection card

activeAriaLabel.description: Aria-label for the active cursor card

footerText.message: Hover a card to preview · Click to apply
footerText.description: Helper text shown at the bottom of the popup

storageErrorMsg.description: Error message when storage write fails

injectErrorMsg.message: Could not apply cursor to this tab.
injectErrorMsg.description: Error message when script injection fails
